hawkish_phrases: additional policy firming may be appropriate
dovish_phrases: the extent of these effects remains uncertain
bank stress could weigh on economic activity
some participants noted downside risks to economic activity
policy lags and cumulative tightening warrant careful approach
summary: The FOMC held rates steady with a unanimous decision, acknowledging restrictive policy stance and elevated inflation while emphasizing heightened uncertainty from banking sector stress and potential credit tightening that could weigh on economic activity.
